data.title: By 2032, Healthcare Marketing & Communications market to reach $43.26 billion valuation due to digital transformation.
data.description: A report titled "Healthcare Marketing & Communications Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The healthcare marketing and communications market is experiencing significant growth, propelled by increasingly stringent regulations and the ever-changing digital landscape. With senior decision-makers encountering growing compliance challenges and diverse stakeholder requirements, the adoption of agile and integrated marketing strategies is crucial for maintaining effective engagement. This market is projected to see continued evolution and expansion in the coming years.

data.title: HK Monetary Authority sets 3.50% rate for retail infrastructure bonds' 2027 payment, announced in latest release.
data.description: In the latest update, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has revealed that the annual interest rate for the second payment on retail infrastructure bonds, scheduled for maturity in 2027, will be set at 3.50%. This announcement comes as a significant development in the financial sector, impacting investors and bondholders.
